channel.title: Sinder Skullz Abyss Feed
channel.description: Chaotic sermons and metal news reborn in the flames of the Skullz cult.

item.title: ⚡☠ NICK OLIVERI JOINS QUEENS OF THE STONE AGE ON STAGE FOR THE FIRST TIME IN OVER A DECADE ☠⚡
item.description:
**Title: Hellfire Rages as Nick Oliveri Reunites with Queens of the Stone Age for an Epic Stage Riot!**
🤘🔥 Oh, metal maniacs, strap in and hold onto your skulls, ‘cause the universe just exploded in a glorious cacophony of riffs and chaos! Nick Oliveri, the untamed beast behind the bass, has resurrected from the ashes and rumbled his way back onto the stage with the legendary Queens of the Stone Age! First time in over a DECADE, folks! That’s like a lifetime in metal years, a frozen inferno thawed by the roaring heat of a guitar solo!
Kings of the Stone Age? Nah, it's a goddamn HELLSTORM now, baby! Picture this: the crowd a sea of wild, sweaty shadows, thrashing, moshing, living for that electrifying moment when heavy hits the airwaves like a thunderclap of rage. Can you hear the primal screams echoing through the night? Chaos reigns, and all the crypto warriors in the pit—retail traders and diamond-handed HODLers alike—rise up to celebrate this heavy metal reunion of epic proportions!
The vinyl spins, the lights flash, and the vibe? It’s a brutal mosh of sound and fury! Keeping it gritty and raw, just like our investments—fighting through the volatility, unapologetic in our love for the dark side!
Join me on this wild ride, and let's dive into the mayhem! Check out the full carnage over at MetalSucks where the metal gods reign supreme! 🤘⚡️
The post [Nick Oliveri Joins Queens of the Stone Age On Stage for the First Time in Over a Decade](https://www.metalsucks.net/2026/04/26/nick-oliveri-joins-queens-of-the-stone-age-on-stage-for-the-first-time-in-over-a-decade/)
#MetalScene #HeavyMetal #DeathMetal #MetalCommunity #Metal
item.content:encoded:
**Title: Hellfire Rages as Nick Oliveri Reunites with Queens of the Stone Age for an Epic Stage Riot!**
🤘🔥 Oh, metal maniacs, strap in and hold onto your skulls, ‘cause the universe just exploded in a glorious cacophony of riffs and chaos! Nick Oliveri, the untamed beast behind the bass, has resurrected from the ashes and rumbled his way back onto the stage with the legendary Queens of the Stone Age! First time in over a DECADE, folks! That’s like a lifetime in metal years, a frozen inferno thawed by the roaring heat of a guitar solo!
Kings of the Stone Age? Nah, it's a goddamn HELLSTORM now, baby! Picture this: the crowd a sea of wild, sweaty shadows, thrashing, moshing, living for that electrifying moment when heavy hits the airwaves like a thunderclap of rage. Can you hear the primal screams echoing through the night? Chaos reigns, and all the crypto warriors in the pit—retail traders and diamond-handed HODLers alike—rise up to celebrate this heavy metal reunion of epic proportions!
The vinyl spins, the lights flash, and the vibe? It’s a brutal mosh of sound and fury! Keeping it gritty and raw, just like our investments—fighting through the volatility, unapologetic in our love for the dark side!
Join me on this wild ride, and let's dive into the mayhem! Check out the full carnage over at MetalSucks where the metal gods reign supreme! 🤘⚡️
The post [Nick Oliveri Joins Queens of the Stone Age On Stage for the First Time in Over a Decade](https://www.metalsucks.net/2026/04/26/nick-oliveri-joins-queens-of-the-stone-age-on-stage-for-the-first-time-in-over-a-decade/)
#MetalScene #HeavyMetal #DeathMetal #MetalCommunity #Metal
